transcript: Good afternoon, Underbakke & Associates, may I help you?

Good afternoon, Underbakke & Associates, may I help you?

Okay, what is your inquiry? And you'd better make it fast, and I don't want any screwing around. What do you want?

Okay, let me give you my inquiry.
Good afternoon, Underbakke & Associates, may I help you?
Okay. Well, let's get serious, now. I've got a job I need done, and I need it done within thirty days' time. Is that, uh... timeframe the--
We're... we're not interested in doing business with you, but I appreciate your call.
I'll put you into the tracking system if you keep on complain...
I gotta find a way to do it, though, first of all.
So you'll have to call back again.
Good afternoon, Underbakke & Associates, may I help you?
Yeah, you need some tracking work done? Is that what I understand?
Good afternoon, Underbakke & Associates, may I help you?
Hi, this is Douglas from Best... Services? I was trying to do, uh... uh, employee verification check?

Good afternoon, Underbakke & Associates, may I help you?
Yes, sir, what's your mailing address?
That was the wrong number. I'm not going to put you... uh, report you to US West again. Now, you...

Good afternoon, Underbakke & Associates, may I help you?
Yeah, hang up again. Go ahead and hang up.
Good afternoon, Underbakke & Associates, may I help you?
